name: tweet_generator
description: High-fidelity social media content architect. Generates professional, viral, or technical tweets based on your chosen topic and style. Includes AI-driven suggestions for optimal posting times based on crypto-market activity cycles.

topic.description: The main subject of the tweet (e.g. 'Bitcoin ETF', 'Base Ecosystem', 'AI Agents')

style.description: The writing style for the tweet

context.description: Optional: Additional context, specific points, or links to include

target_audience.description: Optional: Who is this tweet for? (e.g. 'Degens', 'VCs', 'Builders')
